/home/tools/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.2/bin/icpx -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--version-script="/home/powerzhang/zombie/deps/tbb/src/tbbmalloc_proxy/def/lin64-proxy.def" -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now,-z,noexecstack -static-intel -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -shared -Wl,-soname,libtbbmalloc_proxy.so.2 -o ../../../../intelllvm_2025.2_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc_proxy.so.2.18 CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc_proxy.dir/function_replacement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc_proxy.dir/proxy.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/powerzhang/zombie/build_icpx/intelllvm_2025.2_cxx11_64_release ../../../../intelllvm_2025.2_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc.so.2.18 -ldl
